description: editor-wisdom 修复轮 —— 基于 reports/ralph-editor-wisdom-review.md 的 3 Critical + 5 Major + 8 Minor 发现，逐条修复上一轮 Ralph 伪装通过的问题。基础分支 ralph/editor-wisdom（已含 15 feat commits）。核心目标：让硬门禁真接入编排、清除静默降级、修正伪造模型 id、加跨模块契约测试。

userStories.title: [C1] 硬门禁接入真实编排入口
userStories.description: As a quality gate, run_review_gate must be actually called by the ink-review python orchestration, not just referenced in markdown.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `grep -rn run_review_gate --include='*.py'` at repo root; record current call sites in progress.txt (expected: only review_gate.py + its test)

Identify the python-side ink-review orchestration entry: prefer scripts/step3_harness_gate.py if exists; otherwise read ink-writer/skills/ink-review/SKILL.md to locate the real python module and pick the right seam
Import ink_writer.editor_wisdom.review_gate.run_review_gate at the orchestration entry and call it after existing checkers
When checker score < config.hard_gate_threshold: invoke polish-agent with violations, then re-run checker; max 3 retries
After 3 failed retries: write chapters/{n}/blocked.md with remaining violations AND exit the chapter generation with a non-zero return code (no silent passthrough)

New integration test tests/editor_wisdom/test_review_gate_wired.py: monkey-patch a checker that always returns score=0.1, run the real orchestration entry, assert (a) polish called exactly 3 times (b) blocked.md exists (c) the final chapter file is NOT emitted (d) non-zero exit / raised sentinel
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: [C2] 清除静默降级，索引缺失必须硬报错
userStories.description: As a reliability requirement, when config.enabled=true but vector index or rules.json is missing, the system must raise explicitly, not silently degrade.
acceptanceCriteria: Define new exception class ink_writer.editor_wisdom.exceptions.EditorWisdomIndexMissingError
Retriever.__init__ raises EditorWisdomIndexMissingError when vector_index/ or rules.json missing (replace current RuntimeError)
context_injection.py and writer_injection.py: the try/except Exception wrapping Retriever() must re-raise when config.enabled=true, only swallow and return empty-section when config.enabled=false
checker.py: the 'rules=[] -> score=1.0' branch: when config.enabled=true raise EditorWisdomIndexMissingError; only return score=1.0 when enabled=false

New test tests/editor_wisdom/test_no_silent_fallback.py: (a) delete vector_index/ then call Retriever() asserts raises (b) with enabled=true context_injection propagates the exception (c) with enabled=false context_injection returns empty section without raising
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: [C3] 清除 checker 评分契约二义性
userStories.description: As a contract cleanup, score must have a single source of truth. Adopt option B: LLM returns only violations; score is server-computed.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit ink_writer/editor_wisdom/checker.py SYSTEM_PROMPT and user prompt: remove all instructions asking the LLM to output a 0-1 score or scoring rubric; keep only 'output violations[] and summary'
Keep _compute_score as the sole score source; compute as max(0, 1 - sum(weight[severity] for v in violations)) with weights hard=0.3, soft=0.1, info=0; document formula in a function docstring
Update schemas/editor-check.schema.json: annotate the score field description as 'server-computed, not from LLM'
Update tests/editor_wisdom/test_checker.py: mock LLM returns score=0.99 in its output AND 2 hard violations; assert the function's final output has score=0.4 (LLM-provided score is ignored)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: [M3] 修正伪造的 Anthropic model id
userStories.description: As a runtime correctness fix, replace fabricated model snapshots with real ids so the pipeline actually runs.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `grep -rE "claude-(haiku|sonnet|opus)-[0-9]" --include='*.py'` at repo root; record findings in progress.txt
Change scripts/editor-wisdom/03_classify.py model to 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001' (match checker.py)
Change scripts/editor-wisdom/05_extract_rules.py model to 'claude-sonnet-4-6' (unsuffixed latest alias)
Extract both ids as module-level constants HAIKU_MODEL and SONNET_MODEL in a new module ink_writer/editor_wisdom/models.py; import from there in the two scripts

New smoke test tests/editor_wisdom/test_model_ids_valid.py: regex-scan all python files under scripts/editor-wisdom/ and ink_writer/editor_wisdom/ and assert every model id matches r'^claude-(haiku|sonnet|opus)-\d(-\d)?(-\d{8})?$' AND explicitly reject forbidden substrings '20241022', '20250514'
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: [M1] 修复 retriever category 过滤 + typo
userStories.description: As retrieval correctness, category-filtered retrieval must return true top-K by relevance within that category, not global top-N then filter.
acceptanceCriteria: Fix the `search_k = min(len(self._metadata), len(self._metadata))` typo in retriever.py
When category is specified: slice the vector matrix to rows whose metadata.category == target, compute numpy inner product, take top-k (acceptable because rule count < 200)
Retriever.retrieve return values now include a score: float field (inner product)

New test tests/editor_wisdom/test_retriever_category.py: build mock index with 10 categories × 3 rules each (30 rules); call retrieve(query='opening tips', category='taboo', k=3); assert all 3 results have category=='taboo' AND scores are descending
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: [M2] 批处理失败不中断 + 周期性缓存刷盘
userStories.description: As batch robustness, 03_classify.py and 05_extract_rules.py must not crash the entire run on a single-file failure, and must periodically flush cache.
acceptanceCriteria: In both 03_classify.py and 05_extract_rules.py: wrap each per-file LLM call with try/except; on failure append a line to data/editor-wisdom/errors.log with fields file_hash, filename, error_type, error_msg, timestamp (JSON lines)
Change _save_cache to flush every 10 successful items OR every 60 seconds, whichever comes first; also flush once in a top-level try/finally's finally block

New test tests/editor_wisdom/test_batch_resilience.py: monkey-patch the LLM caller to raise RuntimeError on the 3rd, 5th, 7th files out of 10; assert (a) script exits 0 (b) errors.log contains exactly 3 entries (c) cache file contains at least 4 successful results after completion
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: [M4] 黄金三章 applies_to 硬化 + 消费侧统一
userStories.description: As a consistency fix, rules in golden-three categories must automatically get applies_to='golden_three', and writer_injection must filter by category to match golden_three.py.
acceptanceCriteria: 05_extract_rules.py post-processing: after LLM extraction, if rule.category in {opening, hook, golden_finger, character} then merge 'golden_three' into applies_to (skip if already present)
writer_injection.py golden-three branch: filter using category ∈ GOLDEN_THREE_CATEGORIES instead of 'golden_three' in applies_to, matching golden_three.py
schemas/editor-rules.schema.json: applies_to items restricted to enum ['all_chapters', 'golden_three', 'opening_only']

New test tests/editor_wisdom/test_golden_three_applies_to.py: feed a synthetic raw rule with category='opening' through extraction post-processing, assert applies_to contains 'golden_three'; then set up a golden-three writer context and assert the rule is retrieved
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: [M5] retrieve_golden_three_rules 按相关度合并
userStories.description: As retrieval fidelity, merging per-category retrievals must sort by score globally, not by alphabetical category order.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify ink_writer/editor_wisdom/golden_three.py retrieve_golden_three_rules: after per-category retrieval, merge with sorted(candidates, key=lambda r: -r.score) and truncate to k
Depends on US-005 which exposes score on Rule results
New test: mock retrievals for 4 categories return rules with scores [0.9, 0.2, 0.5, 0.7]; assert merged order by score descending regardless of category iteration order
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: [Minor 合并] 8 条 Minor 修复
userStories.description: As polish, address all 8 Minor findings in one story since each is small.
acceptanceCriteria: m1: review_gate.py lines 115-151 initialize violations=[] and score=1.0 before the loop so max_retries=0 does not UnboundLocalError; add regression test
m2: context_injection.py lines 76-82 append all 4 golden-three categories (opening, hook, golden_finger, character) not just 'opening'
m3: checker.py code-fence stripping changed to regex r'^```(?:\w+)?\n([\s\S]*?)\n```$' (re.MULTILINE as needed)
m4: schema applies_to enum done in US-007; add a docs/editor-wisdom-integration.md note listing the whitelist
m5: scripts/editor-wisdom/02_clean.py replace `hash((i, ng)) & 0xFFFFFFFF` with hashlib.blake2b(...).digest() for reproducibility
m6: polish_injection tests add assertion that emitted diff contains at least 2 of the 3 violation quote substrings
m7: add logs/editor-wisdom/ to .gitignore
m8: ink_writer/editor_wisdom/cli.py rebuild subcommand supports --from-step N (1..6) to resume
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 端到端冒烟脚本 —— 真实跑通一次硬门禁
userStories.description: As validation, run a full smoke test proving the hard gate actually blocks a bad chapter end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: New script scripts/editor-wisdom/smoke_test.py: (1) run `ink editor-wisdom rebuild` if vector_index missing (2) synthesize a mock chapter text that clearly violates multiple hard rules (3) call the real review_gate orchestration (4) assert 3 polish attempts + blocked.md exists
Produces reports/editor-wisdom-smoke-report.md logging each step, duration, and token usage
Update docs/editor-wisdom-integration.md: add 'Running the smoke test' section with command + expected output
If ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is absent, script exits 0 with status 'skipped' and writes a clear note in the report (do NOT fail)
Depends on US-001..US-009 all passing
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
